title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
